entry.title: Which is the correct Learning Journey and Certification for Project Managers for SAP S/4HANA, Public
entry.content:
In the below link, if you navigate to Knowledge Requirements > SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition > Role: Project Manager, the Learning Journey and Certification both point to the Implementation Consultant. Is this an error? If yes, can it be fixed so that we know which certification to do for this role?

https://partneredge.sap.com/en/partnership/manage/competency/requirements.html?#section-1-accordion-panel-section-row-item_2-widewidgets-accordionitem_copy_1_1292473518

Furthermore, the "Project Management" link in this page, is broken and does not take you anywhere:

https://partneredge.sap.com/en/products/s4hanacld/public-edition/about/training-and-education.html 

Thank you

entry.title: Certification: Discovering SAP Activate - Implementation Tools and Methodology
entry.content:
Hi all,
I am wondering why in this Learning Path the "Topic areas" for the certification include "Agile Project Management" and "Agile Project Delivery" but in the Learning journey this topics are not mentioned ?

entry.title: is doing a certification gives the edge to a consultant in the job market
entry.content: is doing a certification gives the edge to a consultant in the job market if one wants to start as a fresher from recruitment profile or just theoritical plus experiential knowledge is enough to get started.

entry.title: How to keep certification valid if changing organization.
entry.content:
Hi SAP,

I have resigned from the X Org. from which I took certification and kept delta and certification validity.

Since I'm leaving when 1H 2024 has been released, and "Stay Current" is still not available. How would I be able to keep my certifications valid.

entry.title: Digital Badge not received after passing the certification
entry.content:
on 6th May 2024, i completed the certification C_TS4FI_2021. After successfully completing the exam, i received a mail that i have passed the exam. However, i have not received any follow on mail to claim the digital badge, and also when i check certification tab under 'My learnings' section the certificate is not available.

My universal id is tusharpoddar@gmail.com

I have already raised Ticket on same day (Ticket ID 751434) which is lying unattended on 4th day today.

I have raised it of twitter of Learning@SAP but no one seems to be bothered. Is there any other way or escalation method available for this

entry.title: SF Certification Invalid Exam Link
entry.content:
I had a scheduled SF certification exam but when I clicked Begin Exam as per proctor's instructions, the exam didn't load and just showed gray screen all through out. We tried a couple more times and I was even asked to force restart but the exam still didn't load after 30 minutes of back and forth.

I reached out to Examity and was told that the link SAP provided to them is invalid. Has anyone encountered this? Not sure if this is due the fact that 2311 is sunseting hence they are no longer allowing test takers?

I had previously taken other certifications and didn't encounter this issue.

entry.title: SAP HCM certification
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I am working as a SAP HCM consultant for quite very few years in India payroll 

I wanted to go for Sap certification but I am not sure which one, Hana,EC.(SF), there are lot many!

I am not sure as a functional consultant  what should I opt for that will help me in future. 

CertificationSAP enhancement package for SAP ERP, version for SAP HANA

entry.title: VOUCHER CER001-SAP Certification Exam, One Attempt
entry.content:
Dear SAP, 

Please advise how to get the Free voucher CER001-SAP Certification Exam in one Attempt ? 

Thank you so much. 

Trinh Nguyen

entry.title: Cer001 exam
entry.content: How prepare for cer001 exam in PP module. What resources to use? Are Learning journeys enough? What if learning journey does not leads to certification in PP module?

entry.title: Financial Accounting Certification Options - Please compare C_TS4FI & C_S4CFI
entry.content:
Appreciate guidance for certification at the intermediate level for Financial Accounting. 

Kindly descibe the difference between C_TS4FI & C_S4CFI.  Is the differentiating factor one is Cloud Private Edition and one is Cloud Public Edition, and if true, which is recommended for an SAP Consultant role. Also, are these considered beginner level certifications, and are there any intermediate certifications or is the next level only Professional?  

Are there any other FICO certifications available I have missed?

Thank you!! Greatly appreciate the insight!

entry.title: Learning journey via learning hub
entry.content: I have received my free certification attempt CER001 and activated my licence. Now to do a specific certification I need to complete learning journey which is available on learning hub. Do I get access to learning hub after purchasing CER001 or I have to buy it separately?

entry.title: Unable to link p-user with s-user because they both have separate universal ids
entry.content: I am unable to link my personal account (p-user) to my work SAP account (s-user), the problem is I created a universal id for both accounts. I have certification on the p-user account and a learning hub on the s-user one. How can I now link them when they already have separate UIDs? I get an error message when trying telling me that the account is already linked to a UID. I need this as I want to be able to renew my certification through the learning hub.

entry.title: C_ABAPD: SAP Certified Associate - Back-End Developer - ABAP Cloud
entry.content:
Dear All,

I am a fresher and I want to obtain C_ABAPD certification. 

Question1: C_ABAPD certification is for fresher ? Can a fresher get this certification?
Question2: Is their any certification guide available for C_ABAPD certification from SAP PRESS?
I am not getting any proper guide for the preparation. Please help.

Thank You.

entry.title: Learning Hub erwerben als Privatperson
entry.content:
Guten Tag zusammen,

gerne möchte ich mein bestehendes Wissen als Key User ausbauen und mich im Selbststudium im Bereich SAP zertifizieren.

Da kam ich auf das Learning Hub, welches mir gut gefiel. Leider muss beim Kauf ein Unternehmen angegeben werden.

Kann man als Privatperson das aktuelle Learning Hub nicht erwerben? Wenn nein, haben Sie Empfehlungen wie ich mein Wissen ausbauen kann und eine Zertifizierung anstreben könnte? 

Danke und viele Grüße 

Patrick L.

entry.title: sap certification for disclosure management (DM) and Funding management (FM)
entry.content:
Hi SAP Gurus, 

Do you know if disclosure management (DM) and Funding management (FM) are sap certifications ? or if those are embeded en some sap certifiacitions?

Regards, 

Anderson CM.

SAP Disclosure Management SAP Funding Management

entry.title: SAP SuccessFactors Certification
entry.content: Hi I am trying to attempt the SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Certification for the first time. Please guide me how to schedule the exam and prepare better for the test.

entry.title: C_S4CFI_2402 - SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Editio
entry.content:
Hello,

I have completed these SAP Learning Journeys that are required for C_S4CFI_2402 - SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - Financial Accounting:

1. Outlining the Financial Accounting Overview in SAP S/4HANA

2. Outlining the Record to Report Process in SAP S/4HANA

3. Describing the Receivables Management Process in SAP S/4HANA

4. Describing the Payables Management Process in SAP S/4HANA

5. Performing Asset Accounting Processes in SAP S/4HANA

6. Implementing SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

I have completed all of the quiz questions for each learning journey and extensively studied the questions to a point where I can answer all the quiz questions with a 100% score.

I just attempted the sample questions provided on the certification page, and I found that they were extremely difficult and much different than the quiz questions for the required learning journeys.

I would like to ask everyone, if you think that being able to answer all of the quiz questions sucessfully is enough to pass the certification exam?

I would also like to ask everyone, if you can recommend some additional free study materials to better prepare for C_S4CFI_2402 - SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - Financial Accounting?

Thank you.

entry.title: Hi Team, I am preparing for the SAP FI certification exam. I need links to practice questions
SAP FI certification practice question
entry.content: Hi Team, I am preparing for the SAP FI certification exam. I need links to practice questions

entry.title: SAP Ariba: Contracts why is there no Learning System
entry.content:
Hi,

Part of signing up for a subscription to the learning hub and was clearly advertised that there were practice systems to help with your learning

Unless I am missing something there are no learning systems for SAP Ariba Contracts to help with the certification in this area which is really disappointing

Am I missing something and does anyone know why?

Thank you
